title: 263. Starka rapporter och tveksamma fusioner
summary_md:
# 263. Starka rapporter och tveksamma fusioner

**Feed**: aktiepodden  
**Published**: 2026-05-22  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

Episode 263 contrasts a cautious macro backdrop — sticky European inflation, a high oil price risking USD 180, rising US 10-year yields and energy-crisis emergency measures — against a surprisingly strong reporting season dominated by Mag7/AI names. The hosts highlight standout reports (Asmodee, BTS Group, Lagercrantz, Addtech, Nibe) and dissect the Klarabo/SBB property merger as a case study in weak synergies, before a deep-dive on M&A drivers, valuation discipline and price as the key determinant of returns. Overall tone is macro-wary but constructive on selected individual companies.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟢 ASMDEE — Asmodee | **BUY** (Strong)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 80%

Very strong Q4 with 22% organic growth, collectible-card demand expected to persist, EBT margin +1.5pp, falling debt enabling more M&A.

#### Reasoning

Hosts call it a 'jättestark rapport': 22% organic growth led by collectible cards with a trend management expects to hold into 26/27. Own production -9.8% but on tough Star Wars Unlimited comps that ease ahead as US inventories normalise, supporting margins. Reduced leverage removes the historic Achilles heel and keeps acquisition strategy active — read positively by investors.

#### Sell Triggers

- if collectible-card demand fades faster than guided
- if own game production stays negative once comps ease
- if leverage rises again on a large acquisition

> *"Ja, 22%. Organisk tillväxt. ... Jag tyckte det var en jättestark rapport."*

---

### 🟢 BTS-B — BTS Group | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 65%

Turnaround confirmed: +4% organic in US with better-than-expected margins; previously in hosts' turnaround portfolio; stock +16% on the day.

#### Reasoning

A fallen growth star that said in Q4 the US problems were over; the morning report delivers proof with 4% organic US growth and better-than-expected margins. Hosts had singled it out in their turnaround portfolio earlier in the year and are pleased to see it inflect, with shares up 16% in morning trade.

#### Sell Triggers

- if US organic growth stalls again
- if margins relapse in coming quarters

> *"rapporten som kom in i morse ger ju lite svar på tal här där man växer 4% organiskt. I USA och har bättre marginal än väntat."*

---

### 🟢 LAGR-B — Lagercrantz | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 70%

Strong report on all points; serial acquirers re-rating from chronically underrated; up ~20% in three months; positive sentiment seen continuing.

#### Reasoning

Report was strong on essentially every metric, with organic growth and solid profitability that counters the 2025 narrative of serial acquirers as chronically underrated. Hosts see a broader sentiment shift for the group, with Lagercrantz already +20% in three months and analysts structurally underestimating acquisition-driven growth — a setup they expect to keep working.

#### Sell Triggers

- if acquisition pace slows materially
- if organic growth or margins disappoint
- if sentiment toward serial acquirers reverses

> *"Lagerkrans-rapport var verkligen bra på egentligen alla punkter ... jag tror att det kommer att fortsätta vara positivt sentiment runt Lagerkrans."*

---

### 🟠 ADDT-B — Addtech | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 55%

Presented good figures, part of the serial-acquirer group beginning to re-rate.

#### Reasoning

Mentioned briefly alongside Lagercrantz as having presented good numbers, supporting the thesis that the serial-acquirer cohort is re-rating after a weak 2025. No standalone deep-dive, so conviction is lower than for Lagercrantz.

#### Sell Triggers

- if serial-acquirer sentiment reverses
- if acquisition pace or organic growth weakens

> *"Även Adtech presenterade siffror som också var bra."*

---

### 🟡 NIBE-B — Nibe | **HOLD** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 60%

Good report (+7% organic, better margins, Climate Solutions +10%, stronger H2 guided) but market sold off on fragile confidence; hosts urge divesting Stoves and cleaning balance sheet.

#### Reasoning

Hosts judge it a good report — 7% organic growth, margin improvement, Climate Solutions +10% with >10% margin and a stronger H2 — but the bar was set high after a strong run and weak Stoves/tariffs plus shaky confidence drove a sharp negative reaction. They argue Stoves doesn't fit the heat-pump/ventilation core and divesting it would free capital and de-lever (net debt/EBITDA ~2.7).

#### Sell Triggers

- if Climate Solutions momentum fades
- if tariffs keep hurting Stoves with no divestment
- if H2 fails to strengthen as guided

> *"Man växer 7% organiskt, förbättrar marginalerna. Det viktigaste området i Climate Solutions går starkt. ... Det tyckte inte marknaden. Som skickade ner aktien."*

---

### 🟡 KLARA-B — Klarabo | **HOLD** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Neutral | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 55%

Merger with SBB-origin property arm offers only SEK 120m synergies vs SEK 47bn portfolio; ~1.7% yield below ~3% funding; market reaction neutral (+1%).

#### Reasoning

Synergies of SEK 120m are significant against ~SEK 800m operating profit but tiny versus the SEK 47bn portfolio, and the ~1.7% direct yield sits below the ~3% average funding cost — an unattractive spread. Hosts see the deal as broadly neutral (better liquidity, maybe financing) with no clear re-rating; Handelsbanken agrees it won't drive a short-term re-rating despite both trading at deep discounts.

#### Sell Triggers

- if funding costs rise further versus property yield
- if synergies fail to materialise
- if discount to NAV persists with no catalyst

> *"transaktionen driver inte omvärdering på kort sikt och jag landar väl där också."*

---

### ⛔ AAK — AAK | **AVOID** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 40%

Cited as profitability-only focus that has not been very value-creating over time; growth ultimately matters more long term.

#### Reasoning

Used as a counter-example when discussing acquisitions: AAK's hard focus on profitability has not been very value-creating, since there is a clear ceiling on margin gains whereas growth is rewarded and benefits companies over the long run. A passing critical remark rather than a developed thesis.

#### Sell Triggers

- if AAK adds a credible growth driver
- if margin expansion translates into sustained value creation

> *"till exempel AAK som har stenhårt fokuserat på lönsamhet det har ju inte varit så himla värdeskapande över tiden"*

---

### 🟠 DVYSR — Devyser | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Neutral | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 45%

Strong operational development over 4-5 years but stock roughly flat as it grows into a high IPO valuation.

#### Reasoning

Despite excellent international operational progress over four to five years since listing, the share is essentially flat because it came to market at a high valuation and must grow into it — meaning a tired share price until earnings catch up with the multiples. Cited as a lesson that valuation matters, not an active buy call.

#### Sell Triggers

- if earnings fail to catch up with the valuation
- if operational growth slows

> *"aktien är i princip flät just för att man kom in till så pass hög värdering så har man ju inte alls fått ta del av det som aktieägare än."*

---

### 🟠 EMBRAC-B — Embracer | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 45%

Messy report with writedowns and ongoing spin-offs (Fellowship); guides SEK 1bn cash EBIT which would make valuation look ok; Warhorse LotR game a potential upside.

#### Reasoning

Still messy: continued writedowns and a complex spin-off path (Fellowship to be a separate listing, leaving an unclear residual Embracer). However, guidance for SEK 1bn cash EBIT would make the valuation look reasonable if delivered, and Warhorse's planned Lord of the Rings game adds optionality. Hosts repeatedly call it a 'knepig aktie' — interesting but hard to underwrite.

#### Sell Triggers

- if cash EBIT misses the SEK 1bn guide
- if further large writedowns appear
- if the Fellowship spin-off destroys rather than surfaces value

> *"Man guidar ju fortsatt för att man ska nå en miljard i det man kallar för cash ebit då. Och gör man det så ser värderingen såklart okej ut. ... En knepig aktie, ja."*

---

### 🟢 NVDA — Nvidia | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 55%

Beat expectations sharply; hosts muse that Mag7 is what one should own as these names take over.

#### Reasoning

Reported last night and beat expectations 'rätt makabert', reinforcing the hosts' half-resigned view that the Mag7 names are driving the market and may be what one should own as they take over the world. Constructive but expressed as a broad market observation rather than a rigorous single-stock thesis.

#### Sell Triggers

- if AI capex expectations roll over
- if Mag7 leadership breaks down
- if guidance disappoints in a future quarter

> *"Nvidia släppte ju rapporten igår kväll, slog ju förväntningarna rätt makabert."*

---
